languages.text: {n}Полковник морщится и пробегается яростным взглядом по своим людям. Те под его взором ежатся, расправляют плечи и кивают.{/n} "Нет. Не больны. Не совсем. Мы держимся. Нас не сломить".

traits.locale_text: {n}Полковник морщится и пробегается яростным взглядом по своим людям. Те под его взором ежатся, расправляют плечи и кивают.{/n} "Нет. Не больны. Не совсем. Мы держимся. Нас не сломить".
traits.speaker: IzhdrigBatoshskiColonel

languages.text: {n}The colonel grimaces and sweeps a furious gaze over his people. Under his glare, they flinch, straighten their backs, and nod.{/n} "No. Not sick. Not really. We're hanging in there. We can't be broken."
languages.original_text: {n}Полковник морщится и пробегается яростным взглядом по своим людям. Те под его взором ежатся, расправляют плечи и кивают.{/n} "Нет. Не больны. Не совсем. Мы держимся. Нас не сломить".

traits.locale_text: {n}The Colonel grimaces and sweeps his furious gaze across his people. Under his stare, they flinch, straighten their backs and nod.{/n} "No. Not sick. Not really. We're hanging in there. We can't be broken."

{n}The colonel grimaces and sweeps a furious gaze over his people. Under his glare, they flinch, straighten their backs, and nod.{/n} "No. Not sick. Not really. We're hanging in there. We can't be broken."

{n}The colonel grimaces and glances around at his soldiers. You can see him fighting the attack himself, determined not to reveal it to his subordinates — and, under his stare, the soldiers square their shoulders and nod, seeming to master themselves.{/n} "No. Not sick. Not really. We're hanging in there. We can't be broken."

{n}The Colonel grimaces and sweeps his furious gaze across his people. Under his stare, they flinch, straighten their backs and nod.{/n} "No. Not sick. Not really. We're hanging in there. We can't be broken."

{n}The colonel grimaces and sweeps a furious gaze over his people. Under his glare, they flinch, straighten their backs, and nod.{/n} "No. Not sick. Not really. We're hanging in there. We can't be broken."

{n}The colonel grimaces and sweeps a furious gaze over his people. Under his glare, they flinch, straighten their backs, and nod.{/n} "No. Not sick. Not really. We're hanging in there. We can't be broken."

languages.text: 「病気じゃない。本当に。まだ頑張れる。折れない。」
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel grimaces and glances around at his soldiers. You can see him fighting the attack himself, determined not to reveal it to his subordinates — and, under his stare, the soldiers square their shoulders and nod, seeming to master themselves.{/n} "No. Not sick. Not really. We're hanging in there. We can't be broken."

traits.locale_text: 「病気じゃない。本当に。まだ頑張れる。折れない。」

languages.text: {n}Der Colonel verzieht das Gesicht zu einer Grimasse und wirft seinen Leuten einen wütenden Blick zu. Diese weichen daraufhin zurück, nehmen Haltung an und nicken.{/n} "Nein, nicht krank. Nicht wirklich. Wir sitzen hier fest. Niemand kann uns brechen."
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel grimaces and sweeps a furious gaze over his people. Under his glare, they flinch, straighten their backs, and nod.{/n} "No. Not sick. Not really. We're hanging in there. We can't be broken."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Colonel verzieht das Gesicht zu einer Grimasse und wirft seinen Leuten einen wütenden Blick zu. Diese weichen daraufhin zurück, nehmen Haltung an und nicken.{/n} "Nein, nicht krank. Nicht wirklich. Wir sitzen hier fest. Niemand kann uns brechen."

languages.text: {n}Le colonel grimace et foudroie ses subordonnés du regard. Cette seule expression suffit à les rappeler à l'ordre et ils se redressent aussitôt avant d'opiner du chef.{/n} « Non, pas exactement. Nous tenons le coup. Nous ne pouvons pas nous permettre de flancher. »
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel grimaces and sweeps a furious gaze over his people. Under his glare, they flinch, straighten their backs, and nod.{/n} "No. Not sick. Not really. We're hanging in there. We can't be broken."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le colonel grimace et foudroie ses subordonnés du regard. Cette seule expression suffit à les rappeler à l'ordre et ils se redressent aussitôt avant d'opiner du chef.{/n} « Non, pas exactement. Nous tenons le coup. Nous ne pouvons pas nous permettre de flancher. »

languages.text: {n}El coronel hace una mueca y recorre con una mirada furiosa a su gente, que se endereza y asiente.{/n} «No. No estamos enfermos. No exactamente. Aguantaremos. No nos doblegarán».
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel grimaces and sweeps a furious gaze over his people. Under his glare, they flinch, straighten their backs, and nod.{/n} "No. Not sick. Not really. We're hanging in there. We can't be broken."

traits.locale_text: {n}El coronel hace una mueca y recorre con una mirada furiosa a su gente, que se endereza y asiente.{/n} «No. No estamos enfermos. No exactamente. Aguantaremos. No nos doblegarán».

languages.text: {n}Albay, yüzünü buruşturup adamlarına öfkeyle bakıyor. Sert bakışları altında irkiliyor, sırtlarını dikleştiriyor ve başlarını sallıyorlar.{/n} "Hayır. Hasta değiliz. Gerçekten. Ayakta kalmaya çalışıyoruz. Bizi yıkamazlar."
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel grimaces and sweeps a furious gaze over his people. Under his glare, they flinch, straighten their backs, and nod.{/n} "No. Not sick. Not really. We're hanging in there. We can't be broken."

traits.locale_text: {n}Albay, yüzünü buruşturup adamlarına öfkeyle bakıyor. Sert bakışları altında irkiliyor, sırtlarını dikleştiriyor ve başlarını sallıyorlar.{/n} "Hayır. Hasta değiliz. Gerçekten. Ayakta kalmaya çalışıyoruz. Bizi yıkamazlar."

languages.text: {n}上校脸色一沉，用愤怒的目光扫过他的部下。在他的逼视下，众人先是一缩，随即挺直腰板，点了点头。{/n}“不，没有。我们还撑得住。我们不会被击垮。”
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel grimaces and sweeps a furious gaze over his people. Under his glare, they flinch, straighten their backs, and nod.{/n} "No. Not sick. Not really. We're hanging in there. We can't be broken."
